use_cases: Landing page hero sections with interactive particle text that responds to cursor movement
Portfolio or creative agency showcase pages requiring engaging visual effects
Startup landing pages wanting memorable, high-impact typography animations
Interactive banner displays that react to user cursor proximity
Decorative header sections with physics-based particle simulations forming text
ai_summary: An interactive particle typography effect that renders text as a field of individual particles. When the cursor approaches, particles disperse with physics-based repulsion and smoothly return to their original positions. The effect combines typography rendering with real-time particle physics simulation to create engaging, cursor-driven visual experiences for landing pages and hero sections.
